context.projectOverview: Final sprint of Native-Surface Multi-Lens Evaluator Panel. Sprints 1-2 built the canonical reference (skills/shared/lens-panel.md), the optional lensVerdicts schema field, the drift gate (src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts), and the lens-aware evaluator agent MODE (full|deterministic|lens). Sprint 3 wires the three orchestrators (bober.run/sprint/eval) to actually USE the panel: add a gated panel branch at each evaluator-spawn step, copy the canonical reference into each skill's references/ dir so it inlines into the generated commands, regenerate the .claude/commands outputs, and extend the drift gate to cover all three reference copies. Off by default => exactly one full evaluator, byte-identical.

completedSprints.title: Canonical reference + lensVerdicts + drift gate
completedSprints.summary: skills/shared/lens-panel.md (split fan-out, majority-vote/fail-closed, lensVerdicts shape, 4 verbatim fragments); optional lensVerdicts on EvalResultSchema; drift gate. Commit 0dc9cd8.

completedSprints.title: Lens-aware evaluator agent modes + sync gate
completedSprints.summary: agents/bober-evaluator.md gained additive MODE:full|deterministic|lens:<name>; .claude copy byte-identical; sync gate added to lens-panel-parity.test.ts. Commit 0736260.

gitNote:
Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist (graph CLI, agent .md, .bober artifacts). Stage ONLY this sprint's files with explicit paths: the 3 SKILL.md, the 3 references/lens-panel.md copies, the 3 regenerated .claude/commands/*.md, and src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts. NEVER `git add -A`/`git add .`. CRITICAL: the panel branch in each SKILL.md must be ADDITIVE and GATED (the existing single-evaluator spawn prose is the else-path, untouched). The .claude/commands/*.md must be REGENERATED from SKILL.md + sorted references using the EXACT inlineSkill format in scripts/update-all.mjs (SKILL.md content, then for each ref in sorted order: '

---

<!-- Reference: <file> -->

<content>'). After regenerating, `npm run update-all:check` MUST report no drift for this project. Branch bober/evaluator-lens-panel — never main.
